shots.line: Bună dimineața, dragii mei! Astăzi vă arăt ce mănânc eu într-o zi.
shots.image_prompt: ohwxbunica, a 3D Pixar-style elderly Romanian grandmother wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf, standing in a cozy rustic village kitchen, warm morning light, a front-facing waist-up shot, smiling warmly at the camera
shots.motion_prompt: she speaks warmly to the camera, gentle head movements and a friendly smile, subtle natural motion

shots.image_prompt: a wooden cutting board with a thick slab of slănină (cured pork fat) and a knife, a sliced red tomato and onion beside it, on a rustic kitchen table, warm morning light, close-up food shot, photoreal
shots.motion_prompt: a hand slices the slănină, faint steam rising, shallow depth of field, slow gentle motion

shots.line: La micul dejun: slănină cu ceapă și o roșie din grădina mea.
shots.image_prompt: ohwxbunica, a 3D Pixar-style elderly Romanian grandmother wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf, holding a rustic plate of food, in a village kitchen, warm light, a front-facing waist-up shot, proud cheerful expression
shots.motion_prompt: she holds up the plate proudly toward the camera and speaks, slight nod, warm smile, subtle natural motion

shots.image_prompt: a rustic Romanian breakfast spread on a wooden table: bread, slănină, tomatoes, onions, a steaming cup of coffee, warm morning light from a window, overhead food shot, photoreal
shots.motion_prompt: steam rises from the coffee, a hand reaches in to take a piece of bread, slow gentle motion

shots.line: Asta e tot, dragii mei. Poftă bună și ne vedem mâine!
shots.image_prompt: ohwxbunica, a 3D Pixar-style elderly Romanian grandmother wearing a white embroidered Romanian ie blouse and a red floral headscarf, in a cozy village kitchen, warm light, a front-facing waist-up shot, waving goodbye with a big warm smile
shots.motion_prompt: she waves goodbye to the camera and smiles warmly, gentle natural motion
